Built and maintained by \u003ca href=\"https://www.onewave-ai.com\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eOneWave AI\u003c/a\u003e -- AI consulting for small and mid-size businesses.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e173 skills\u003c/strong\u003e across three pillars: \u003cstrong\u003ebusiness\u003c/strong\u003e (sales, marketing, consulting, ops), \u003cstrong\u003eeveryday life\u003c/strong\u003e (personal finance, travel, fitness, job hunting), and \u003cstrong\u003ecoding\u003c/strong\u003e (engineering, design, AI agent architecture).\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eFeatured: /agent-army\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-featured-agent-army\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Featured: /agent-army\" href=\"#featured-agent-army\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eDeploy 3 to 50+ independent Claude agents in parallel, each with its own 1M token context window. Each agent spawns sub-agents underneath. A top-tier commander (Fable or Opus) orchestrates the swarms, and you pick a power level -- Max Power, Heavy, Balanced, or Economy -- that sets the Opus/Sonnet/Haiku model mix for each layer. The system runs in waves -- execute, audit, propagate -- and checks its own work between each.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eBuilt for tasks where one agent isn't enough: large refactors, full-site audits, bulk content generation, codebase migrations. <p dir="auto">Production-ready skills for Claude Code. Built and maintained by <a href="https://www.onewave-ai.com" rel="nofollow">OneWave AI</a> -- AI consulting for small and mid-size businesses.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>173 skills</strong> across three pillars: <strong>business</strong> (sales, marketing, consulting, ops), <strong>everyday life</strong> (personal finance, travel, fitness, job hunting), and <strong>coding</strong> (engineering, design, AI agent architecture).</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Featured: /agent-army</h2><a id="user-content-featured-agent-army" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Featured: /agent-army" href="#featured-agent-army"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Deploy 3 to 50+ independent Claude agents in parallel, each with its own 1M token context window. Each agent spawns sub-agents underneath. A top-tier commander (Fable or Opus) orchestrates the swarms, and you pick a power level -- Max Power, Heavy, Balanced, or Economy -- that sets the Opus/Sonnet/Haiku model mix for each layer. The system runs in waves -- execute, audit, propagate -- and checks its own work between each.</p>
<p dir="auto">Built for tasks where one agent isn't enough: large refactors, full-site audits, bulk content generation, codebase migrations. Battle-tested on 60+ concurrent agents in a single session.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong><a href="https://github.com/OneWave-AI/claude-skills/tree/main/agent-army">View agent-army</a></strong></p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Getting Started</h2><a id="user-content-getting-started" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Getting Started" href="#getting-started"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Each skill is a self-contained <code>SKILL.md</code> file that Claude Code loads as a system prompt. No dependencies, no build step.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Skill Format</h2><a id="user-content-skill-format" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Skill Format" href="#skill-format"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Every skill is a single <code>SKILL.md</code> file with YAML frontmatter:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="---
name: skill-name                 # required — kebab-case, matches the folder
description: What the skill does and when to use it.   # required — drives auto-selection
tools: Read, Write, Bash, Agent  # optional — restrict tool access; omit to inherit all
model: inherit                   # optional — pin a model; omit to inherit the session model
---

# Skill prompt content here..."><pre>---
<span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">skill-name                 </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> required — kebab-case, matches the folder</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">What the skill does and when to use it.   </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> required — drives auto-selection</span>
<span class="pl-ent">tools</span>: <span class="pl-s">Read, Write, Bash, Agent  </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> optional — restrict tool access; omit to inherit all</span>
<span class="pl-ent">model</span>: <span class="pl-s">inherit                   </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> optional — pin a model; omit to inherit the session model</span>
---

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Skill prompt content here...</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Claude Code loads this as a system prompt when the skill is invoked. Only <code>name</code> and <code>description</code> are required; most skills here use just those two. The <code>description</code> is what Claude reads to decide when to trigger the skill, so make it specific.</p>
<hr>

<ol dir="auto">
<li>Fork the repository</li>
<li>Create a new folder with your skill name</li>
<li>Add a <code>SKILL.md</code> following the format above</li>
<li>Submit a pull request</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Skills should be production-ready, well-documented, and solve a real problem. No placeholder or stub skills.</p>
